sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc.의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3Q25 순매출은 24억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 3% 성장했으며, 조정 희석 EPS는 1.71달러(+10% y/y)로 수익성 개선세를 이어갔다.
2025년 9월 말 기준 주주환원 총액이 17억 달러를 넘어섰으며, 이 중 자사주 매입이 8억 9,400만 달러를 차지해 자본 배분 능력을 재확인했다.
CFO는 2025년 연간 기준으로 역대 최고 매출과 영업이익을 달성했다고 밝혔으며, 2026년에도 성장 궤도를 유지하겠다는 전망을 제시했다.

businessChanges.text: 3Q25 부문별 순매출은 거래소 13억 달러, 채권·데이터 서비스 6억 1,800만 달러, 모기지 테크놀로지 5억 2,800만 달러로 구성되어 다각화된 수익 구조를 보였다.
분기 중 예측 시장 플랫폼 Polymarket에 전략적 투자를 발표하며 탈중앙화 예측 시장으로 사업 영역을 확장했다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 희석 EPS는 1.42달러(+25% y/y), 조정 희석 EPS는 1.71달러(+10% y/y)로 이익 증가 폭이 크게 두드러졌다.
3Q25 영업이익은 12억 달러(+6% y/y), 조정 영업이익은 14억 달러(+3% y/y)이며, 조정 영업이익률은 59%를 기록했다.
조정 희석 EPS는 1.71달러로 조정 순이익도 견조하게 유지되었으며, 비용 통제 흐름이 안정적이었다.

watchItems.text: Polymarket 투자 효과와 예측 시장 데이터 수익화 경로가 향후 컨퍼런스콜의 핵심 관전 포인트다.
모기지 테크놀로지 부문(5억 2,800만 달러)의 금리 민감도와 회복 속도가 2026년 가이던스의 주요 변수가 될 전망이다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2529550d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Intercontinental Exchange Reports Strong Third Quarter 2025 · 3Q25 net revenues of $2.4 billion, +3% y/y Jeffrey C. Sprecher , ICE Chair & Chief Executive Officer, said, "We are pleased to report our third quarter results, which extend our track record of revenue and earnings per share growth. Our customers continue to rely on our mission-critical data and technology to manage risk and drive efficiency in a dynamic macroeconomic environment. In early October, we also announced a strategic investment in Polymarket, a leading prediction market platform, expanding our footprint into decentralized prediction markets, which is aligned with our commitment to providing innovation and data-driven insights to our customers. As we look to the balance of the year and beyond, our focus remains on leveraging our world-class technology,  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러.

culture, and operating expertise to better serve our customers and create value for our stockholders." · 3Q25 GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $1.42, +25% y/y · 3Q25 adj. diluted EPS of $1.71, +10% y/y · 3Q25 operating income of $1.2 billion, +6% y/y; adj. operating income of $1.4 billion, +3% y/y · 3Q25 operating margin of 49%; adj. operating margin of 59% · Through September 30, 2025, returned over $1.7 billion to stockholders, including $894 million in share repurchases ATLANTA & NEW YORK, October 30, 2025 - Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE), a leading global provider of technology and data, today reported financial results for the third quarter of 2025. For the quarter ended  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $894 million = 8억 9,400만 달러; $816 million = 8억 1,600만 달러; $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $1.42 = 1.42달러; $1.71 = 1.71달러; $1.4 = 1.4달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러; $894 = 894달러; $816 = 816달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러.

Adjusted net income attributable to ICE was $980 million in the third quarter and adjusted diluted EPS were $1.71. Please refer to the reconciliation of non-GAAP financial measures included in this press release for more information on our adjusted operating expenses, adjusted operating income, adjusted operating margin, adjusted net income, adjusted diluted EPS and adjusted free cash flow. Warren Gardiner, ICE Chief Financial Officer, added: "During 2025, we've generated record revenues and operating income. This performance enabled us to return over $1.7 billion to stockholders, while also continuing to invest in strategic growth initiatives. As we look to the balance of 2025 and towards another successful year in 2026, we remain focused on extending our track record of innovation and execution." Third Quarter 2025 Business Highlights Third quarter consolidated  Normalized numeric aliases: $980 million = 9억 8,000만 달러; $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $980 = 980달러; $1.71 = 1.71달러; $1.7 = 1.7달러.

billion including exchange net revenues of $1.3 billion, fixed income and data services revenues of $618 million and mortgage technology revenues of $528 million. Consolidated operating expenses were $1.2 billion for the third quarter of 2025. On an adjusted basis, consolidated operating expenses were $981 million. Consolidated operating income for the third quarter was $1.2 billion, and the operating margin was 49%. On an adjusted basis, consolidated operating income for the third quarter was $1.4 billion, and the adjusted operating margin was 59%. $ (in  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $618 million = 6억 1,800만 달러; $528 million = 5억 2,800만 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $981 million = 9억 8,100만 달러; $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; $618 = 618달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1,275 = 1,275달러; 2,411 million = 24억 1,100만 달러; 1,265 million = 12억 6,500만 달러; 1,275 million = 12억 7,500만 달러; 1,212 million = 12억 1,200만 달러; 1,136 million = 11억 3,600만 달러; 1,137 million = 11억 3,700만 달러.
